reasoning: AICO (Autoridades Indígenas de Colombia) is an indigenous political party in Colombia. The Colombian Senate has 108 seats, with only 2 seats reserved specifically for the indigenous constituency. AICO historically competes for these reserved seats and won exactly 1 seat in the 2022 elections. Major parties like the Historic Pact, Conservative Party, Liberal Party, and Green Alliance dominate the broader national constituency.
